title: Dataset 1. Functional genomic profiling of O-GlcNAc reveals its context-specific interplay with RNA polymerase II.
author: Descostes, Nicolas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset is used in the bioformatic methods of the article  Functional genomic profiling of O-GlcNAc reveals its context-specific interplay with RNA polymerase II  (doi: 10.1186/s13059-025-03537-2). The corresponding code can be found in the repository https://github.com/descostesn/chromglycomethods.git
steps_raw: This dataset is used in the bioformatic methods of the article  Functional genomic profiling of O-GlcNAc reveals its context-specific interplay with RNA polymerase II  (doi: 10.1186/s13059-025-03537-2). The corresponding code can be found in the repository https://github.com/descostesn/chromglycomethods.git
